blockedReasons.summary: Runtime readiness remains blocked for the Gemma 3N E4B plus KV260 target.
Model assets are not loaded and no model runtime session exists.
No local session store, retention rule, or manifest schema is configured.
A reviewed redaction and summary schema is required before export can exist.
No launcher-owned local chat session is active.

handoffRefs.summary: Base chat/session surface is consumed as local data only.
Runtime readiness remains a prerequisite for lifecycle changes.
Device/session status is consumed as local data only.

lifecycleOperations.label: create session
lifecycleOperations.userAction: Request a new local chat session after readiness exists.

lifecycleOperations.label: restore session
lifecycleOperations.launcherAction: Refuse restore because no session manifest exists.
lifecycleOperations.userAction: Select a prior local session only after a reviewed store exists.

lifecycleOperations.label: clear session
lifecycleOperations.launcherAction: No-op because no local chat session exists.
lifecycleOperations.userAction: Clear only an active future session owned by the launcher.

lifecycleOperations.label: close session
lifecycleOperations.launcherAction: No-op because no runtime session exists.
lifecycleOperations.userAction: Close an active future session without altering artifacts.

lifecycleOperations.label: export summary
lifecycleOperations.launcherAction: Refuse export because no chat session or summary schema exists.
lifecycleOperations.userAction: Export only a bounded local summary after explicit review.

limitations: Data-only chat session lifecycle fixture; no lifecycle operation is enabled.
No prompts, responses, transcripts, manifests, summaries, model paths, generated artifacts, private paths, secrets, or tokens are stored.
No artifacts are read or written and no retention policy is active.
No KV260 hardware access, serial access, network call, provider call, telemetry, upload, or write-back is performed.
Create, restore, clear, close, and export controls remain disabled or blocked until explicit evidence and reviewed boundaries exist.
This is not a release, tag, versioned compatibility commitment, MCP, LSP, IDE, marketplace, or telemetry implementation.

sessionIdentityPolicy.pathPolicy: no user, model, or workspace paths are emitted by this fixture
sessionIdentityPolicy.reusePolicy: future session reuse requires a reviewed lifecycle boundary

sessionStoragePolicy.artifactPolicy: no manifest, transcript, summary, or lifecycle artifact is written
sessionStoragePolicy.pathPolicy: no filesystem path is configured, read, or emitted by this fixture
sessionStoragePolicy.promptPolicy: prompt bodies are not accepted, stored, summarized, or exported
sessionStoragePolicy.responsePolicy: response bodies are not generated, stored, summarized, or exported
sessionStoragePolicy.retentionPolicy: future retention must be explicit, local, and user controlled
sessionStoragePolicy.transcriptPolicy: no transcript exists and transcript persistence is disabled

stateTransitions.guard: checked chat/session fixture data is available
runtime readiness, model load, and session store evidence are absent
no local session manifest boundary exists
